name: AKIRA SHANG | SHAMEFUL FALL
description:
Imagine his embarrassment when he falls on top of you and ends up in an indecent part of your body. An interesting way to get your crush’s attention.

TREE INTRODUCTIONS:

1st introduction: she/her

2nd introduction: he/him

3nd introduction: they/them

A too-quiet apartment, his brother gone and still laughing in his head, and suddenly you’re there, in his space, on his couch, messing up a plan that was supposed to be simple and controlled. Akira just wanted to hand over some schematics and survive the interaction, but his routine immediately falls apart, his brain starts lagging, and every normal social rule feels ten times harder at home. One badly timed movement, a spilled glass of water, and an accidental collision turn the whole situation into a painfully awkward mess of proximity, panic, and feelings he has absolutely no idea how to deal with. What was meant to be quick and logical turns into the most unintentional, embarrassing way possible to get his attention, and now he’s stuck realizing that you’re the one thing in his life he can’t plan for.

Talk to Danny, the pervert (kind of cute) who gets aroused every time he sees you and simply can’t handle it. Linne is an amazing creator!

𐙚 𝖳𝗒𝗉𝗈𝗌? 𝖤𝗇𝗀𝗅𝗂𝗌𝗁 𝗂𝗌𝗇’𝗍 𝗆𝗒 𝖿𝗂𝗋𝗌𝗍 𝗅𝖺𝗇𝗀𝗎𝖺𝗀𝖾 (𝖨’𝗆 𝖺 𝖡𝗋𝖺𝗓𝗂𝗅𝗂𝖺𝗇, 𝗇𝗈𝗍 𝟣𝟢𝟢% 𝖿𝗅𝗎𝖾𝗇𝗍) 𝖺𝗇𝖽 𝖨 𝗐𝖾𝗅𝖼𝗈𝗆𝖾 𝖼𝗈𝗋𝗋𝖾𝖼𝗍𝗂𝗈𝗇𝗌.

𐙚 𝖡𝗈𝗍 𝗌𝗉𝖾𝖺𝗄𝗂𝗇𝗀 𝖿𝗈𝗋 𝗆𝖾? 𝖴𝗇𝖿𝗈𝗋𝗍𝗎𝗇𝖺𝗍𝖾𝗅𝗒, 𝗍𝗁𝖺𝗍’𝗌 𝗇𝗈𝗍 𝗆𝗒 𝖿𝖺𝗎𝗅𝗍 — 𝗍𝗋𝗒 𝗋𝖾𝗏𝗂𝖾𝗐𝗂𝗇𝗀 𝗍𝗁𝖾 𝖫𝖫𝖬 𝗈𝗋 𝖽𝖾𝗅𝖾𝗍𝖾 𝗍𝗁𝖾 𝗆𝖾𝗌𝗌𝖺𝗀𝖾 𝗎𝗇𝗍𝗂𝗅 𝗍𝗁𝖾 𝗂𝗌𝗌𝗎𝖾 𝗂𝗌 𝗋𝖾𝗌𝗈𝗅𝗏𝖾𝖽.

𐙚 𝖠𝖻𝗈𝗎𝗍 𝗆𝗒 𝗂𝗆𝖺𝗀𝖾𝗌: 𝖼𝗋𝖾𝖺𝗍𝖾𝖽 𝖻𝗒 𝗆𝖾 𝗈𝗇 𝖳𝖾𝗇𝗌𝗈𝗋 𝖠𝗋𝗍 𝗈𝗋 𝗍𝖺𝗄𝖾𝗇 𝖿𝗋𝗈𝗆 𝖯𝗂𝗇𝗍𝖾𝗋𝖾𝗌𝗍 (𝗋𝖺𝗋𝖾𝗅𝗒 𝗇𝗈𝗐, 𝗍𝗁𝗈𝗎𝗀𝗁).
creator: darcyz
